title: Calm bedtime story
summary: A short calming story before sleep.
steps: The hero sees a tiny light.
The hero follows it calmly.
The hero finds a safe place to rest.
warnings: MVP uses local templates, not AI.

title: Calm bedtime story — full version
summary: A quiet story about resting after a gentle day.
steps: The hero sees a little light near the window.
The light leads through soft clouds.
The hero learns that every day can end peacefully.
A small cozy house appears.
The hero thanks the adventure and falls asleep.
Read the ending slowly.
dontDo: do not extend when the child is falling asleep

title: Brave adventure
summary: A story about small courage and a good ending.
steps: The hero finds a map.
The journey begins.
The hero helps someone weaker.
warnings: Avoid scary scenes for younger children.

title: Brave adventure — full version
summary: A story showing that courage can be calm and kind.
steps: The hero finds a map with a star.
The map leads to someone needing help.
The hero is afraid but takes one small step.
Then another step follows.
A lost friend is helped home.
Everyone celebrates small courage.

title: Friendship story
summary: A short story about a little animal finding a friend.
steps: The animal loses the path.
A kind helper appears.
They return home together.
warnings: Do not use protected characters or brands.

title: Friendship story — full version
summary: A gentle story about help and kindness.
steps: A small animal goes for a walk and loses the path.
It sits under a leaf and looks around.
A new friend asks if help is needed.
They walk together and tell funny things.
They see a warm light at home.
The animal learns that asking for help is brave.
dontDo: do not make being lost scary
do not make the hero helpless

title: Funny robot
summary: A light story about a robot learning to laugh.
steps: The robot misunderstands a task.
A funny situation happens.
The robot learns to ask for help.

title: Funny robot — full version
summary: A story about a robot whose mistake becomes learning.
steps: The robot should clean the room.
It builds a sock tower instead.
Everyone smiles kindly.
The robot asks how to fix it.
They clean together and keep one sock flag.
The robot learns that mistakes can teach.

title: Dragon and castle
summary: A story about a dragon who does not need to be scary.
steps: The dragon lives near a castle.
Someone thinks the dragon is scary.
The dragon helps the castle.

title: Dragon and castle — full version
summary: A story about not judging by looks.
steps: A dragon with huge wings lives near the castle.
People are afraid because they never talked to it.
The wind takes the royal flag.
The dragon gently flies and finds it.
People see the dragon is kind.
The dragon becomes a castle friend.

title: Story from drawing
summary: A simple story from a local template.
steps: Choose a hero.
Choose a place.
Add a calm ending.

title: Story from drawing — full template
summary: A universal story template a parent can adapt to a drawing.
steps: Name the drawing hero.
Describe the place simply.
Add a small non-scary problem.
Show how the hero looks for a solution.
Add a friend or helpful object.
End calmly and positively.
dontDo: do not add adult or scary content
